To ensure consistent behavior, align by using integer-based range with exact divisibility: set end=1-1e-8 to make count exactly 1e8.

To align semantics, adjust end to 1.0 - 1e-6 to ensure both yield 5 elements and match half-open interval behavior per official docs.

TensorFlow tf.squeeze raises InvalidArgumentError when trying to squeeze axis=-1 (dim 5) because that dimension has size 4, not 1. Paddle allows axis specification even if some axes aren't size-1 (it silently ignores them), but TF strictly requires all specified axes to have size 1.
